title: Foo Bar OLTP to OLAP Migration
description: Fix a broken migration from Postgres (OLTP) to ClickHouse (OLAP). The sync job fails, schema is mismatched, and incremental load is not working. Restore the migration pipeline.

tasks.description: Fix sync job, schema alignment, and incremental load from Postgres to ClickHouse

infrastructure.description: Postgres app.sales with 15 rows. ClickHouse analytics.sales table exists but schema mismatched or empty. Sync script broken.
